data.content: [Claude plan_review 2026-04-02] Plan v4 approved. Inventory verified: 14 output declarations across 3 .loom files, no changes needed. Design keeps current Loom vocabulary as canonical (remote_main, pr, remote, local), adds ArtifactTarget enum for validation with new target types (branch, note, approval, live_deployment). No prompt template breakage. ~90 lines across 5 files. Test strategy covers round-trip, rejection, legacy compat, and parser loading.
